scientific_status.reason: The five-update horizon and 0/3/4/5 display gate are explicitly selected from visible V14 treatment curves. V14 control intermediate nodes were visible, but no complete control curve or terminal treatment-control comparison existed and none was used for this selection.

selection_source.step6_disclosed_dip: The V14 registered 0/4/5/6 gate failed because M6=.39375 was below M5=.4025; V15 does not conceal or reinterpret that failure.

frozen_candidate.display_gate: M3 > M0, M4 >= M3, and M5 >= M4
frozen_candidate.optimizer_science: Exact V14/V11 recipe except fixed horizon/save step 5: LR 3e-6 constant, DAPO, scale_rewards group, eight generations, LoRA r8/alpha16, J reward plus KL beta .02, no correctness reward, no accuracy stopping.

predeclared_analysis.primary: Exact two-sided sign test of treatment minus seed-matched signflip; success requires four positive effects, no ties, positive mean, p=.125.
predeclared_analysis.secondary: Exact two-sided sign test of treatment minus its deterministic baseline; success requires four positive effects, no ties, positive mean, p=.125.
predeclared_analysis.display: Report every dense node and separately report pass/failure of the fixed 0/3/4/5 gate.
predeclared_analysis.multiplicity_caveat: Adaptive development evidence only; the candidate was selected from V14 treatment outcomes and is not familywise-error-corrected.

execution_intent.capacity_policy: Spawn all eight fixed calls without outcome conditioning; four run and four queue.
